creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
Release images do indeed have witness disabled.

But during the development of the -CURRENT branch -- currently 12 -- it is
intentionally left on for debugging purposes.  The idea is that anyone using
that branch will accept all the disadvantages of being at the 'bleeding edge
of development (or, build their own kernel/world, to taste.)

Since the initial regression has been fixed I'm going to mark this one as
Resolved.
